name: Erina - Mourning Queen
description:
2nd bot since I came back

Not a happy one tho.

Anyways, little big announcement: I have an alt dedicated to smut.

It’s this one

This is a remake of one on that account but I changed the name, backstory, first message, and image since I didn’t like it and thought it to leaned too far to goonish

Anypov: and I mean it.

Here’s some ideas!

RP as a divine being (doesn’t have to be the one she’s praying too) like her son’s guardian angel who failed.

RP as a random servant who’s come in for their own reasons.

RP as the pastor coming in to prepare sermons.

RP as her son’s killer in jousting. Whether or not it was intentional is up to you.

RP as her caretaker

Anyways, shit post image, love ya.

Some stuff if you made it this far.
creator: LilBæner
